summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of the Razorpay payments / GST invoice module. All 16 pytest backend test cases passed (plans, config, auth enforcement, intra/inter-state GST breakdown, invalid plan/amount validation, bad signature rejection, transactions listing, PDF invoice download). Full frontend flow verified end-to-end on the deployed preview URL: landing nav Payments tab, unauth redirect to /login, post-login /payments page, plan selection, MH→KA state switch (CGST/SGST→IGST), custom amount, GSTIN & phone validation, confirm dialog contents, disabled pay button when amount=0. No blocking issues found.

issues: Minor: React hydration warnings in console about <span> inside <select>/<option>. These originate from an instrumentation/devtools wrapper (x-ve-dynamic) not Payments.jsx itself — cosmetic only, no functional impact.

critical_code_review_comments: GST rounding: _calc_gst uses round() which can cause 1-paisa drift for odd amounts when splitting CGST/SGST; currently handled by sgst = gst_total - cgst so it stays consistent. OK.
Custom amount upper bound is 10,00,000 in backend (line 151) and also enforced in frontend; aligned.
Invoice PDF generation is synchronous (weasyprint) inside an async route — consider wrapping in asyncio.to_thread for heavy concurrency (non-blocking for this scale).
verify endpoint only updates DB to 'signature_invalid' before raising; no audit log entry — acceptable for MVP.
Central admin emails auto-elevate to master_admin on login; ensure payment transactions are always tied to user_id (already done via Depends(get_current_user)).
test_credentials: admin@ipolabs.com / admin@123 (login via 'Admins' role on Internal Access panel, then email/password). Note: on /login page, a role button must be clicked BEFORE the Sign In button activates — this is by design but could be a UX hiccup.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 2 TEST_ prefixed payment_transactions docs in MongoDB during invoice tests (auto cleaned up via pytest teardown). No residual data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_payments_module.py cover all payment endpoints incl. intra/inter-state GST math, PDF invoice generation via MongoDB-seeded paid txn. All green. For the real Razorpay checkout UI popup after the confirm dialog, we did not invoke window.Razorpay end-to-end in UI (to avoid real card flow); if needed, hook window.Razorpay and assert it was instantiated.
